entry.title: New: CR 24-110 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending the following: 1. FIRST READING of Bill 29, CD1 (2024), to grant a District Boundary Amendment from Agricultural District to Urban District (Conditional District Boundary Amendment) for 14.626 acres located at 454 Ohukai Road, Kīhei, Maui, Hawaiʻi, identified for real property tax purposes as tax map key (2) 3-9-001:034 (por.), for the development of Ohukai Light Industrial Park; 2. FIRST READING of Bill 30, CD1 (2024), to grant a Change in Zoning from County Rural District to M-1 Light Industrial District (Conditional Zoning) for 14.626 acres located at 454 Ohukai Road, Kīhei, Maui, Hawaiʻi, identified for real property tax purposes as tax map key (2) 3-9-001:034 (por.), for the development of Ohukai Light Industrial Park; and 3. RECORDATION of the Unilateral Agreements.

Housing and Land Use Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
